leadText: Seed Bomb (Japanese: タネばくだん Seed Bomb) is a damage-dealing Grass-type move introduced in Generation IV. It is: TR59 in Pokémon Sword and Shield. TM071 in Pokémon Scarlet and Violet. TM128 in Pokémon Legends: Z-A.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Seed Bomb inflicts damage and has no secondary effect. It does not affect targets with Bulletproof . Seed Bomb can be used as part of a Contest Spectacular combination with the user gaining an extra three appeal points if Rototiller was used in the prior turn. Pokémon Legends: Z-A [ edit | edit source ] Seed Bomb is now a multistrike move with 35 power that fires four seeds in front of the user, sweeping from left to right, that explode when they hit the ground or a target. Pokémon Legends: Z-A Category Physical Accuracy 100% Standard Plus Move Power 35 42 Cooldown 7s Move wind-up time 15 frames Effect duration —s Additional effect — — — None

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description D P Pt HG SS PBR The user slams a barrage of hard-shelled seeds down on the foe from above. B W B2 W2 X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA The user slams a barrage of hard-shelled seeds down on the target from above. S V The user attacks by slamming a barrage of hard-shelled seeds down on the target from above. ZA The user attacks by slamming a barrage of large, hard-shelled seeds down on targets from above.
